use_cases: Animated hero section text that cycles through feature highlights or taglines
Landing page headers with rotating value propositions or keywords
Loading or placeholder text with engaging animation to maintain user attention
Typewriter-style word transitions for storytelling or product descriptions
Dynamic text displays for dashboards or analytics interfaces
ai_summary: A smooth word-morphing text component that animates characters transitioning between an array of words with configurable intervals. Features gradient-colored text (blue to purple) with a blinking cursor effect for a polished, modern look. Each character animates independently during the morph phase, creating a fluid text-replacement effect ideal for hero sections, landing pages, or any context requiring dynamic text cycling.
